There is one message we would like to leave with you today it is this trust is not a soft factor in automation it is the foundation for everything else if you want to build an AI ready BIM data backbone you need to build confidence in the system at the same time.

And from our perspective that means for things, brain champions involved people in your organization set governance clear rules who has to do what centralized the data to get as much as possible in a structured way and then scale the system in a way that continuously improves decision making.

Because in the end automation only creates lasting value when people trust the logic trust the data and trust their role within the process.
